---
title: "All_Figures"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: "Table of Contents"
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: true 
    collapsible: true
    collapse-level: 1
    # code-summary: "Show/Hide Code"  # Toggle text for code folding
    # css: 'style_gg.css'
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 880px
      margin-width: 200px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
author: Gled Guri
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{=html}
<style>
body {
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 18px;
}

h1 {
  font-size: 22px;  /* Adjust the size of H1 headers */
  font-weight: normal;  /* Make H1 headers not bold */
}

h2 {
  font-size: 18px;  /* Adjust the size of H2 headers */
  font-weight: normal;  /* Make H2 headers not bold */
}

h3 {
  font-size: 18px;  /* Adjust the size of H3 headers */
  font-weight: normal;  /* Make H3 headers not bold */
}

h4 {
  font-size: 18px;  /* Adjust the size of H4 headers */
  font-weight: normal;  /* Make H4 headers not bold */
}
</style>
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
dwidth <- 150
options(width = dwidth)
```

```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
options(width = 300) #wd
```

```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
options(width = dwidth) #wd
```

```{r}
# Functions -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

scientific <- function(x) {
  c <- log10(x)
  formatted <- paste0("10^", round(c, 2))
  str2expression(formatted)
}
scientific_type_2 <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    x == 0, 
    expression(0), 
    str2expression(paste0(ifelse(x < 0, "-", ""), "10^", round(log10(abs(x)), 5)))
  )
}
scientific_10 <- function(x) {
  c <- log10(x)
  expo <- floor(c)
  base <- round(x / 10^expo,3)
  formatted <- paste0(base,'%*%',"10^", expo)
  str2expression(formatted)
}

scientific_10_type_2 <- function(x) {
c <- scales::scientific_format()(x)
t <- gsub("e", "%*%10^", c)
t2 <- gsub("10\\^\\+", "10\\^", t)
str2expression(t2)
}

round_by10 <- function(x) {
  c <- log10(x)
  expo <- floor(c)
  base <- round(x / 10^expo)
  return(base*10^expo)
}
extract_param <- function (model, par) {
  fit <- (methods::selectMethod("summary", signature = "stanfit"))(object = model, 
                                                                   par = par)
  fit <- fit$summary
  return(fit %>% unlist() %>% as.data.frame)
  # return(fit %>% unlist() %>% as.data.frame %>% round(., 3))
}

extract_matrix <- function (stanMod, param, vector = "mean") {
    dd <- extract_param(stanMod, param)
    nrrow <- str_split(dd %>% rownames(), "\\[") %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
      t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% pull(V2) %>% gsub("\\,\\d+\\]", 
                                                    "", .) %>% as.numeric() %>% max()
    nccol <- str_split(dd %>% rownames(), "\\[\\d+\\,") %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
      t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% pull(V2) %>% gsub("\\]", 
                                                    "", .) %>% as.numeric() %>% max()
    ret <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrrow, nccol)) %>% setNames(c(1:nccol))
    for (i in 1:nrrow) {
      for (j in 1:nccol) {
        ret[i, j] <- extract_param(stanMod, param) %>% 
          filter(rownames(.) == str_subset(rownames(.), paste0("\\[", i, ",", j, "\\]"))) %>% pull(vector)
      }
    }
    return(ret)
}

inverselogit <- function (x) 
{
  return(1/(1 + exp(-x)))
}

logsumexp <- function (x) 
{
    y = max(x)
    y + log(sum(exp(x - y)))
}

softmax <- function (x) 
{
    exp(x - logsumexp(x))
}

softmax_m <- function (data) 
{
    temp <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, ncol = ncol(data), nrow = nrow(data)))
    for (i in 1:ncol(data)) {
        x <- data[, i]
        temp[, i] <- exp(x - logsumexp(x))
    }
    return(temp)
}

select <- dplyr::select
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,results='hide'}
## Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(sf)
library(here)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(MoMAColors);#devtools::install_github("BlakeRMills/MoMAColors")
library(PNWColors);#install.packages("PNWColors")
library(ggspatial)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(rstan)
library(purrr)
# library(QM)
library(gridGraphics)
library(ggridges)
library(scales)
library(cowplot)
library(magick)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,results='hide'}
# Load Data -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
stan_post <- readRDS(here('Intermediate_data','Joint_mod_output.rds'))
stan_post_mock <- readRDS(here('Intermediate_data','Mock_mod_output.rds'))
preds <- read_rds(here('Intermediate_data','Log_D_est_smoothed.rds'))

# Raw data
stan_data <- readRDS(here('Intermediate_data','Joint_mod_data_input.rds'))

# Long format of raw data
raw_data <- stan_data[["sample_data_labeled"]] %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = sp_1:sp_13,names_to = 'sp',values_to = 'raw_reads')

fit <- read_rds(here('Intermediate_data','Log_D_est.rds')) %>% 
    rename(Log_D_est='mean',species_idx='taxa')
    # select(Log_D_est,species_idx,species,tubeID,tube_idx,station_depth_idx,
    #        station_idx,tech,raw_reads,station,lat,lon,depth,depth_cat,wash_idx,sampleidx)

# Load qPCR raw data
qPCR_unk <- stan_data$qpcr_unk

# Load Metabarcoding data
mfu_raw <- read.csv(here('data','mfu_raw2.csv'))
mfu_stan <- stan_data$sample_data_labeled


states <- ne_states(country='United States of America',returnclass = 'sf') %>% 
  filter(name %in% c('California','Oregon','Washington','Nevada')) %>% 
  st_transform("+proj=utm +zone=10 +datum=WGS84 +units=km +no_defs +type=crs")

# Get Canada and transform to the same CRS
canada <- ne_states(country = 'Canada', returnclass = 'sf') %>% 
  filter(name %in% c('British Columbia')) %>% 
  st_transform("+proj=utm +zone=10 +datum=WGS84 +units=km +no_defs +type=crs")

coast_line <- rbind(states, canada)

dat_bbox <- data.frame(xmin=246.1216, ymin=4249.5080, xmax=460.6902, ymax=5365.6749)

sp_list <- sapply(preds, function(df) unique(df[["species"]])) %>% as.vector()


predgrid <- preds[[1]] %>% distinct(grID,depth_cat,x) %>% st_as_sf()

dat_bbox <- preds %>% pluck(1) %>% st_as_sf() %>% st_bbox()

preds_all <- preds %>% list_rbind()

# quantiles of predictions for each species
preds_summ <- preds_all %>% 
  dplyr::select(grID,depth_cat,est,species) %>% 
  group_by(species) %>% 
  mutate(quant=cume_dist(est)) %>% 
  ungroup()

spp_all <- unique(preds_all$species) %>% head(., -1)
spp_all_hake <- unique(preds_all$species)

color_mapping <-
  stan_data$sp_list %>% select(-species_idx) %>% 
  mutate(species=if_else(species=='Zz_Merluccius productus','Merluccius productus',species)) %>% 
  mutate(col = case_when(
    species == 'Engraulis mordax' ~ '#F0944C',
    species == 'Scomber japonicus' ~ '#B2B9BC',
    species == 'Sardinops sagax' ~ '#AB4E68',
    species == 'Trachurus symmetricus' ~ '#CDA59B',
    species == 'Thaleichthys pacificus' ~ '#A3A55F',
    species == 'Clupea pallasii' ~ '#41959A',
    species == 'Sebastes entomelas' ~ '#97D8CA',
    species == 'Tarletonbeania crenularis' ~ '#C47688',
    species == 'Stenobrachius leucopsarus' ~ '#679C74',
    species == 'Tactostoma macropus' ~ '#b4e5dd',
    species == 'Leuroglossus stilbius' ~ '#EEB357',
    species == 'Merluccius productus' ~ '#2E92A2',
    species == 'Microstomus pacificus' ~ '#D85A44')) %>% 
  deframe()

utm_km_crs <- "+proj=utm +zone=10 +datum=WGS84 +units=km +no_defs"

coaststates <- ne_states(country='United States of America',returnclass = 'sf') %>% 
  filter(name %in% c('California','Oregon','Washington','Nevada')) %>% 
  st_transform(st_crs(.))

```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=13, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Figure 2 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
plot_list <- list()

legend <- cowplot::get_legend(
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = preds[[1]], aes(fill = exp(est)), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c(rep('#00496F', 2),pnw_palette(name = "Bay", n = 14, type = "continuous"),rep('#DD4124', 3)),
      name = "Estimated eDNA\nconcentration\n(copies/L)",
      trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
      limits = c(0.05, 200000),
      breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000),
      labels = c('0.1', "1", "10", "100", "1000", "10000", '100000')) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"),
          panel.spacing = unit(0.05, "lines"),
          legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "cm"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'white'),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dashed"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
    theme(legend.justification = c(0, 0.5)))

for (i in 1:length(sp_list)) {
  plot_list[[i]] <-
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = coast_line, fill = 'gray80') +
    geom_sf(data = preds[[i]], aes(fill = exp(est)), color = NA) +
    ggtitle(paste0(sp_list[i])) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c(rep('#00496F', 6),pnw_palette(name = "Bay", n = 14, type = "continuous"),rep('#DD4124', 7)),
      name = "Estimated eDNA\nconcentration\n(copies/L)",
      trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
      limits = c(0.001, 10000000),
      breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000),
      labels = c('0.1', "1", "10", "100", "1000", "10000", '100000')) +
    facet_wrap( ~ depth_cat, nrow = 1) +
    ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax),breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"),
          panel.spacing = unit(0.05, "lines"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'white'),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dashed"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  }


# Load the depth scheme graph
depth_scheme <- image_read(here('raw_plots','Literature_species_dist_1.jpg'))
depth_scheme_plot <- ggdraw() + draw_image(depth_scheme)

# Create titles for columns
title_epipelagic <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_plot(
    ggplot() + 
      geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1), fill = "#b65971", color = NA) +
      theme_void()
  ) +
  draw_label("Surface", fontface = 'bold', size = 14, color = "white")

title_mesopelagic <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_plot(
    ggplot() + 
      geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1), fill = "#86a180", color = NA) +
      theme_void()
  ) +
  draw_label("Midwater", fontface = 'bold',size = 14, color = "white")

title_bathypelagic <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_plot(
    ggplot() + 
      geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1), fill = "#559891", color = NA) +
      theme_void()
  ) +
  draw_label("Deepwater", fontface = 'bold',size = 14, color = "white")


pp1 <- 
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plot_list[[2]]+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[7]]+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[9]]+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[5]]+
      theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[8]]+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")), 
    plot_list[[4]]+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    nrow = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1.11, 1, 1),
    rel_heights = c(1, 1.2)
  )

pp2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(cowplot::plot_grid(ggplot() + theme_void(),title_epipelagic, title_mesopelagic, title_bathypelagic, ncol = 4,rel_widths = c(1,10,10,10)),
                          pp1,
                          nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(0.03, 1))

pp3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp2,legend,nrow = 1,rel_widths = c(1,0.15))

fig_2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp3,depth_scheme_plot,nrow=2,rel_heights = c(11,7), labels = c('(A)','(B)'),label_x = 0.85)
fig_2

ggsave(
  # file = here('plots','2_Figure_2.pdf'),
  file = here('plots','2_Figure_2.jpg'),
  fig_2,
  width = 10,height = 13,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r fig.width=14, fig.height=14, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Figure 3 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

pred_corr <-
  preds_all %>%
  mutate(species=ifelse(species=="Zz_Merluccius productus","Merluccius productus",species)) %>% 
  mutate(coor=paste0(utm.lon.km,'-',utm.lat.km,'-',depth_cat)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(species,est,coor) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "species",values_from="est") %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  dplyr::select(-coor,-`Merluccius productus`) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(
    'Scomber japonicus',
    'Sardinops sagax',
    'Engraulis mordax',
    'Thaleichthys pacificus',
    'Trachurus symmetricus',
    'Clupea pallasii',
    'Sebastes entomelas',
    'Tarletonbeania crenularis',
    'Stenobrachius leucopsarus',
    'Tactostoma macropus',
    'Leuroglossus stilbius',
    'Microstomus pacificus')) %>% 
  cor()


species <- rownames(pred_corr)
n <- length(species)

# --- Long format ---
corr_df <- pred_corr %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("row_sp") %>%
  pivot_longer(-row_sp, names_to = "col_sp", values_to = "r") %>%
  mutate(orig_row = match(row_sp, species),
         orig_col = match(col_sp, species))

lower_df <- corr_df %>% filter(orig_row >= orig_col)  # numbers (lower + diagonal)
upper_df <- corr_df %>% filter(orig_row <  orig_col)  # ellipses (upper)

# --- Ellipse paths ---
t_vals  <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 100)
angle   <- pi / 4
scale_e <- 0.45

ellipse_df <- upper_df %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(pts = list({
    a <- sqrt(max(1 + r, 1e-4)) * scale_e
    b <- sqrt(max(1 - r, 1e-4)) * scale_e
    tibble(
      x_plot = orig_col          + a*cos(t_vals)*cos(angle) - b*sin(t_vals)*sin(angle),
      y_plot = (n + 1 - orig_row) + a*cos(t_vals)*sin(angle) + b*sin(t_vals)*cos(angle)
    )
  })) %>%
  unnest(pts)

# --- Color palette ---
my_cols <- c('#6a0b1f','#b1192b','#d55f4c','grey','#4090c2','#2063a8','#063061')

# Pillar colors matching image 2
pillar_fill <- c("#b05572", "#748a4e", "#3e7878")

fig_3 <-
  ggplot() +
  # --- all your existing layers stay the same ---
  geom_polygon(data = ellipse_df, aes(x = x_plot, y = y_plot,
                                      group = paste0(orig_row, "_", orig_col), fill = r), color = NA) +
  geom_text(data = lower_df, aes(x = orig_col, y = n + 1 - orig_row,
                                 label = sprintf("%.2f", r), color = r), fontface = "bold", size = 2.8) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0.5, xend = 12.5, y = 10.5, yend = 10.5),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0.5, xend = 12.5, y = 6.5, yend = 6.5),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0.5, xend = 12.5, y = 3.5, yend = 3.5),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 2.5, xend = 2.5, y = 0.5, yend = 12.5),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 6.5, xend = 6.5, y = 0.5, yend = 12.5),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 9.5, xend = 9.5, y = 0.5, yend = 12.5),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1.0)+
  # --- NEW: pillar rectangles (drawn before vlines so lines sit on top) ---
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = c(0.5, 6.5, 9.5), xmax = c(6.5, 9.5, 12.5),
           ymin = 17.5, ymax = 18.2,
           fill = pillar_fill, color = NA
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = c(3.5, 8.0, 11.0), y = 17.9,
           label = c("Surface", "Midwater", "Deepwater"),
           color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 4
  ) +
  # --- NEW: manual italic column labels (replaces scale_x axis text) ---
  annotate("text",
           x = 1:n, y = rep(12.8, n),
           label = species,
           angle = 90, hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5,
           fontface = "italic", size = 3.1, color = "black"
  ) +
  # --- scales ---
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = my_cols, limits = c(-1,1), name = NULL,
                       breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.2),
                       guide = guide_colorbar(barwidth=1, barheight=12, direction="vertical")) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = my_cols, 
                        limits = c(-1,1), guide = "none") +
  
  # x-axis: remove auto labels (we placed them manually above)
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = NULL,
    position = "top"
    # expand = expansion(add = 0.5)
  ) +
  # y-axis: expand top to give room for labels + pillars
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = 1:n, labels = rev(species)
    # expand = expansion(add = c(0.5, 8))   # <-- 8 units of extra space at top
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y     = element_text(face = "italic", size = 9,color='black'),
    axis.title      = element_blank(),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
  )

fig_3

ggsave(
  # file = here('plots','3_Figure_3.pdf'),
  file = here('plots','3_Figure_3.jpg'),
  fig_3,
  width = 7,height=7,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r fig.width=8.5, fig.height=13, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Figure 4 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

pred_summary <- preds_summ %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  # mutate(is_abun=quant>=0.75) %>%
  mutate(is_pres=est>0.07) %>% #threshold determining presence
  filter(species%in%spp_all) %>% 
  # filter(species=='Merluccius productus') %>%
  group_by(grID,depth_cat) %>% 
  summarise(num_spp=sum(is_pres),
            tot_DNA=sum(exp(est))) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  left_join(predgrid,by=c("grID","depth_cat")) %>% 
  st_as_sf()

species_richness_map <- 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = coast_line, fill = 'gray80') +
  geom_sf(data = pred_summary, aes(fill = factor(num_spp)), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D") +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(dat_bbox[1], dat_bbox[3]), 
           ylim = c(dat_bbox[2], dat_bbox[4]), 
           expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat, nrow = 1) +
  labs(fill = "Accumulated number of\nspecies defined as 'present'\non smoothed estimated DNA\n(SDM)") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'white'),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dashed"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-125.5, -124))

total_dna_map <- 
  pred_summary %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = tot_DNA), color = NA) +  # Keep fill as raw data (normal scale)
  geom_sf(data = coast_line, fill = 'gray80') +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c('#00496F','#066384','#33a4a7','#9aca9f','#ffa451','#d7433b','#d7433b'), # Your custom colors
    name = "Accumulated DNA\nconcentration for all species\n(copies / L)",
    trans = "log10",
    limits=c(10,20000000),
    breaks = c(10, 100, 1000,10000,100000,1000000,10000000),
    labels = c("10", "100", "1000","10000","100000",'1000000','10000000')) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(dat_bbox[1], dat_bbox[3]), 
           ylim = c(dat_bbox[2], dat_bbox[4]), 
           expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(dat_bbox[1], dat_bbox[3]) +
  ylim(dat_bbox[2], dat_bbox[4]) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'white'),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dashed"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-125.5, -124))


fig_4 <- cowplot::plot_grid(species_richness_map,total_dna_map,ncol = 1,align = 'v',labels=c('A','B'))
fig_4
ggsave(
#   file = here('plots','4_Figure_4.pdf'),
  file = here('plots','4_Figure_4.jpg'),
  fig_4,
  h=13,w=8.5,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r fig.width=14, fig.height=12, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Figure 5 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Figure 5a -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
facet_colors <- c("Surface-South" = "#b65971","Surface-North" = "#b65971", "Midwater" = "#86a180", "Deepwater" = "#559891")

color_mapping <-
  fit %>% distinct(species) %>% head(-1) %>% pull(species) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% setNames('species') %>% 
  mutate(col = case_when(
    species == 'Engraulis mordax' ~ '#F0944C',
    species == 'Scomber japonicus' ~ '#B2B9BC',
    species == 'Sardinops sagax' ~ '#AB4E68',
    species == 'Trachurus symmetricus' ~ '#CDA59B',
    species == 'Thaleichthys pacificus' ~ '#A3A55F',
    species == 'Clupea pallasii' ~ '#41959A',
    species == 'Sebastes entomelas' ~ '#97D8CA',
    species == 'Tarletonbeania crenularis' ~ '#C47688',
    species == 'Stenobrachius leucopsarus' ~ '#679C74',
    species == 'Tactostoma macropus' ~ '#b4e5dd',
    species == 'Leuroglossus stilbius' ~ '#EEB357',
    species == 'Microstomus pacificus' ~ '#D85A44')) %>% 
  deframe()

depth_summary_fit <-
  fit %>% mutate(D_est = exp(Log_D_est)) %>%
  # preds_summ %>% mutate(D_est = exp(est)) %>%
  filter(!species == 'Zz_Merluccius productus') %>% 
  # filter(D_est > exp(-2.5)) %>%
  group_by(depth =  as.factor(depth_cat), species) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_D_est = mean(D_est),
    q_05 = quantile(D_est, 0.025),
    q_95 = quantile(D_est, 0.995),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(depth=as.numeric(as.character(depth))*-1) %>%
  mutate(mean_D_est = if_else(mean_D_est<0.1,0.1,mean_D_est)) %>% 
  mutate(q_05 = if_else(q_05<0.1,0.1,q_05)) %>% 
  mutate(q_95 = if_else(q_95<0.1,0.1,q_95)) %>% 
  mutate(guild=
           if_else(species%in%c('Engraulis mordax',
                                'Thaleichthys pacificus',
                                'Clupea pallasii',
                                'Trachurus symmetricus'),
                   'Surface-North',NA)) %>% 
  mutate(guild=
           if_else(species%in%c('Sardinops sagax',
                                'Scomber japonicus'),
                   'Surface-South',guild)) %>% 
  mutate(guild = 
           if_else(species%in%c('Sebastes entomelas',
                                'Tarletonbeania crenularis',
                                'Stenobrachius leucopsarus'),
                   'Midwater',guild)) %>% 
  mutate(guild = 
           if_else(species%in%c('Tactostoma macropus',
                                'Leuroglossus stilbius',
                                'Microstomus pacificus'),
                   'Deepwater',guild)) %>% 
  mutate(guild = factor(guild, levels = c("Surface-South",'Surface-North',"Midwater", "Deepwater"))) %>% 
  mutate(depth_jitter=depth)

depth_summary_fit$species <- factor(depth_summary_fit$species, levels = c(
  'Sardinops sagax',
  'Scomber japonicus',
  'Clupea pallasii',
  'Thaleichthys pacificus',
  'Trachurus symmetricus',
  'Engraulis mordax',
  'Sebastes entomelas',
  'Tarletonbeania crenularis',
  'Stenobrachius leucopsarus',
  'Tactostoma macropus',
  'Leuroglossus stilbius',
  'Microstomus pacificus'
))


# Create subsets for groups
group1 <- c("Sardinops sagax", "Scomber japonicus")
group2 <- c("Clupea pallasii", "Thaleichthys pacificus", "Trachurus symmetricus", "Engraulis mordax")
group3 <- c("Sebastes entomelas", "Tarletonbeania crenularis", "Stenobrachius leucopsarus")
group4 <- c("Tactostoma macropus", "Leuroglossus stilbius", "Microstomus pacificus")

# Legend plots for each group
legend1 <- depth_summary_fit %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = mean_D_est, x = depth_jitter, color = species, group = species)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = depth_jitter, ymin = mean_D_est, ymax = q_95), alpha = 0.4, width = 12, lty = 5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping[group1], breaks = group1, guide = guide_legend(title = "Surface-South")) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12,face = "italic"))

legend2 <- depth_summary_fit %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = mean_D_est, x = depth_jitter, color = species, group = species)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = depth_jitter, ymin = mean_D_est, ymax = q_95), alpha = 0.4, width = 12, lty = 5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping[group2], breaks = group2, guide = guide_legend(title = "Surface-North")) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12,face = "italic"))

legend3 <- depth_summary_fit %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = mean_D_est, x = depth_jitter, color = species, group = species)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = depth_jitter, ymin = mean_D_est, ymax = q_95), alpha = 0.4, width = 12, lty = 5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping[group3], breaks = group3, guide = guide_legend(title = "Midwater")) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12,face = "italic"))

legend4 <- depth_summary_fit %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = mean_D_est, x = depth_jitter, color = species, group = species)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = depth_jitter, ymin = mean_D_est, ymax = q_95), alpha = 0.4, width = 12, lty = 5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping[group4], breaks = group4, guide = guide_legend(title = "Deepwater")) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12,face = "italic"))

# Extract legends
leg1 <- cowplot::get_legend(legend1+theme(legend.justification = c(0.5, -0.75)))
leg2 <- cowplot::get_legend(legend2+theme(legend.justification = c(0.5, -0.2)))
leg3 <- cowplot::get_legend(legend3+theme(legend.justification = c(0.5, 0.7)))
leg4 <- cowplot::get_legend(legend4+theme(legend.justification = c(0.5, 1.5)))

# Combine legends with spacing
final_legend <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  leg1, leg2, leg3, leg4,
  ncol = 1, align = 'v',
  rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1) # Add space between groups
)

# cowplot::ggdraw(final_legend)

p_legend <- depth_summary_fit %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = mean_D_est, x = depth_jitter, color = species, group = species)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = depth_jitter, ymin = mean_D_est, ymax = q_95), alpha = 0.4, width = 12, lty = 5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping)+
  labs(y = "Estimated eDNA concentration (copies/μL)", x = "Depth (m)", color = "Species") +
  theme_bw()

p_leg <- cowplot::get_legend(p_legend+
                               theme(legend.justification = c(0,0.5)))

dep_spec_prob <- purrr::map(
  levels(depth_summary_fit$species), 
  function(x) {
    d <- depth_summary_fit %>%
      filter(species == x) %>%
      group_by(species) %>%
      mutate(prop = mean_D_est / sum(mean_D_est)) %>% 
      ungroup() %>% 
      dplyr::select(species,mean_D_est,depth,prop,guild)
    return(d)
  }
)

# Function to sample from each species in the list
sample_from_species <- function(tibble_data, sample_size = 10000) {
  tibble_data %>%
    summarise(
      species = unique(species),
      sampled_dep_values = list(sample(depth, size = sample_size, replace = TRUE, prob = prop))
    )
}

# Sample lat from each each species from the PDF
sampled_data <- lapply(dep_spec_prob, sample_from_species) %>% 
  bind_rows(.) %>%
  unnest(sampled_dep_values) %>% 
  left_join(.,depth_summary_fit %>% ungroup() %>% distinct(species,guild),
            by='species')

plots <- purrr::map(
  levels(depth_summary_fit$guild),
  function(x) {
    p <- depth_summary_fit %>%
      filter(guild == x) %>%
      ggplot(aes(y = mean_D_est, x = depth_jitter, color = species, group = species)) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(x = depth_jitter, ymin = mean_D_est, ymax = q_95), alpha = 0.5, width = 0,size=1 ,lty = 1) +
      geom_point(size = 3,alpha=0.7) +
      # geom_smooth(aes(color = species, group = species), method = "loess", span = 0.5, lty = 1, size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5, se = F) +
      geom_line(aes(color = species, group = species), lty = 1, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
      facet_grid(~guild, scales = "free_x") +
      scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping) +
      xlim(limits = c(-508,8))+
      scale_y_log10(limits = c(10^-1,10^6.5),labels=scientific) +
      labs(y = NULL,
           x = "Depth (m)", color = "Species") +
      coord_flip() +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(
        legend.position = 'none',
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, color = "white"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = facet_colors[x], color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        # axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = if (x == levels(depth_summary_fit$guild)[1]) element_text(size = 13) else element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = if (x == levels(depth_summary_fit$guild)[1]) element_text(size = 12) else element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = if (x == levels(depth_summary_fit$guild)[1]) element_line() else element_blank()
      )
    return(p)
  }
)


# p1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plots, nrow = 1,align='h',rel_widths = c(10,9,9,9))
p1 <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plots, nrow = 1,align='h',rel_widths = c(10,9,9,9)) %>%
  cowplot::ggdraw()+
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 25, l = 2))+
  cowplot::draw_label(
    # expression("Estimated" ~ sqrt("eDNA concentration") ~ "(copies/μL)"), 
    "Estimated eDNA concentration (copies/L)",
    x = 0.5, y = -0.01,
    hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5,
    angle = 0,
    size = 13)

# p1

## Figure 5b -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

lat_summary_fit <-
  fit %>% mutate(D_est = exp(Log_D_est)) %>% 
  filter(!species == 'Merluccius productus') %>% 
  group_by(lat,lon,species) %>% 
  summarize(
    xy_D_est = sum(D_est),
    .groups = "drop") %>% 
  mutate(lat_bin=(round(lat*2)/2)) %>% 
  group_by(lat_bin,species) %>%
  summarise(mean_D=mean(xy_D_est),
            q_2=quantile(xy_D_est,0.025),
            q_97=quantile(xy_D_est,0.975)) %>%
  mutate(guild=
           if_else(species%in%c('Engraulis mordax',
                                'Thaleichthys pacificus',
                                'Clupea pallasii',
                                'Trachurus symmetricus'),
                   'Surface-North',NA)) %>% 
  mutate(guild=
           if_else(species%in%c('Sardinops sagax',
                                'Scomber japonicus'),
                   'Surface-South',guild)) %>% 
  mutate(guild = 
           if_else(species%in%c('Sebastes entomelas',
                                'Tarletonbeania crenularis',
                                'Stenobrachius leucopsarus'),
                   'Midwater',guild)) %>% 
  mutate(guild = 
           if_else(species%in%c('Tactostoma macropus',
                                'Leuroglossus stilbius',
                                'Microstomus pacificus'),
                   'Deepwater',guild)) %>% 
  mutate(mean_D=if_else(mean_D<1,0.1,mean_D)) %>%
  mutate(q_97=if_else(q_97<1,0.1,q_97)) %>%
  mutate(q_2=if_else(q_2<1,0.1,q_2)) %>%
  mutate(guild = factor(guild, levels = c("Surface-South", "Surface-North",'Midwater',"Deepwater"))) 


lat_spec_prob <- purrr::map(
  unique(depth_summary_fit$species),
  function(x) {
    d <- lat_summary_fit %>%
      # mutate(mean_D=log(mean_D)-log(0.1)) %>%
      mutate(mean_D=sqrt(mean_D)) %>%
      filter(species == x) %>%
      group_by(species) %>%
      mutate(prop = mean_D / sum(mean_D)) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      dplyr::select(species,mean_D,lat_bin,prop)
    return(d)
  }
)

# Function to sample from each species in the list
sample_from_species <- function(tibble_data, sample_size = 1000) {
  tibble_data %>%
    summarise(
      species = unique(species),
      sampled_lat_values = list(sample(lat_bin, size = sample_size, replace = TRUE, prob = prop))
    )
}

# Sample lat from each each species from the PDF
sampled_data <- lapply(lat_spec_prob, sample_from_species) %>% 
  bind_rows(.) %>%
  unnest(sampled_lat_values) %>% 
  left_join(.,lat_summary_fit %>% ungroup() %>% distinct(species,guild),
            by='species')

plots <- 
  purrr::map(
    levels(depth_summary_fit$guild), 
    function(x) {
      p <-sampled_data %>% 
        filter(guild == x) %>% 
        ggplot(aes(y=species,x=sampled_lat_values,fill = species))+
        geom_density_ridges(bandwidth=0.3)+
        scale_fill_manual(values = color_mapping) +
        facet_wrap(~guild)+
        # scale_y_sqrt()+
        coord_flip()+
        labs(x = 'Latitude (°)')+
        theme_bw()+
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(38, 50, by = 1),limits=c(38,49)) +
        theme(legend.position = 'none',
              strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "white"),
              strip.background = element_rect(fill = facet_colors[x], color = "black"),
              axis.title.y = if (x == levels(lat_summary_fit$guild)[1]) element_text() else element_blank(),
              axis.text.y = if (x == levels(lat_summary_fit$guild)[1]) element_text() else element_blank(),
              axis.ticks.y = if (x == levels(lat_summary_fit$guild)[1]) element_line() else element_blank(),
              axis.title.x = element_blank(),
              axis.text.x = element_blank(),
              axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
      return(p)
    }
  )

p2 <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plots, nrow = 1,align='h',rel_widths = c(2,4,3,3))+
  # cowplot::ggdraw()+
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 25, l = 2))+
  cowplot::draw_line(x = c(0.03, 1.0),y = c(0.68, 0.68),
                     color = "black", size = 0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  cowplot::draw_line(x = c(0.03, 1.0),y = c(0.515, 0.515),
                     color = "black", size = 0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "Columbia river", 
    x = 0.947, y = 0.7, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, angle = 0, size = 12)+
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "Heceta bank", 
    x = 0.95, y = 0.532, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, angle = 0, size = 12)+
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "Probability Density Function (PDF) of estimated eDNA concentration (copies/L)",
    x = 0.5, y = -0.01, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, angle = 0, size = 12)

p3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1,p2,nrow = 2,rel_heights = c(11,16),align = 'v',labels = c('A','B'))
fig_5 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p3,final_legend,ncol = 2,rel_widths = c(6,1.3))
fig_5

ggsave(file = here('plots','5_Figure_5.jpg'),
       fig_5,
       h=12,w=14,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=13, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Supplementary Figure 2 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
plot_list <- list()

legend <- cowplot::get_legend(
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = preds[[1]], aes(fill = exp(est)), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c(rep('#00496F', 2),pnw_palette(name = "Bay", n = 14, type = "continuous"),rep('#DD4124', 3)),
                         name = "Estimated eDNA\nconcentration\n(copies/L)",
                         trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
                         limits = c(0.05, 200000),
                         breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000),
                         labels = c('0.1', "1", "10", "100", "1000", "10000", '100000')) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"),
          panel.spacing = unit(0.05, "lines"),
          legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "cm"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'white'),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dashed"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
    theme(legend.justification = c(0, 0.5)))

for (i in 1:length(sp_list)) {
  plot_list[[i]] <-
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = coast_line, fill = 'gray80') +
    geom_sf(data = preds[[i]], aes(fill = exp(est)), color = NA) +
    ggtitle(paste0(sp_list[i])) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c(rep('#00496F', 6),pnw_palette(name = "Bay", n = 14, type = "continuous"),rep('#DD4124', 7)),
                         name = "Estimated eDNA\nconcentration\n(copies/L)",
                         trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
                         limits = c(0.001, 10000000),
                         breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000),
                         labels = c('0.1', "1", "10", "100", "1000", "10000", '100000')) +
    facet_wrap( ~ depth_cat, nrow = 1) +
    ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax),breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"),
          panel.spacing = unit(0.05, "lines"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'white'),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dashed"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}


depth_scheme <- image_read(here('raw_plots','Literature_species_dist_2.jpg'))
depth_scheme_plot <- ggdraw() + draw_image(depth_scheme)

# Create titles for columns
title_epipelagic <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_plot(
    ggplot() + 
      geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1), fill = "#b65971", color = NA) +
      theme_void()
  ) +
  draw_label("Surface", fontface = 'bold', size = 14, color = "white")

title_mesopelagic <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_plot(
    ggplot() + 
      geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1), fill = "#86a180", color = NA) +
      theme_void()
  ) +
  draw_label("Midwater", fontface = 'bold',size = 14, color = "white")


pp1 <- 
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plot_list[[1]]+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[6]]+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[3]]+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[12]]+
      theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    plot_list[[11]]+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")), 
    plot_list[[10]]+
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0.1, 0, 0), "cm")),
    nrow = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1.11, 1, 1),
    rel_heights = c(1, 1.2)
  )

pp2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(cowplot::plot_grid(ggplot() + theme_void(),title_epipelagic, title_mesopelagic, ncol = 3,rel_widths = c(1,20,10)),
                          pp1,
                          nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(0.03, 1))

pp3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp2,legend,nrow = 1,rel_widths = c(1,0.15))

sf2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp3,depth_scheme_plot,nrow=2,rel_heights = c(11,7), labels = c('(A)','(B)'),label_x = 0.85)
sf2

ggsave(file = here('plots','7_Supplementary_Figure_2.jpg'),
       sf2,
       width = 10,height = 13,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=8, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Supplementary Figure 3 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
sf3 <-
fit %>% filter(!species=='Zz_Merluccius productus') %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = exp(Log_D_est))) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "grey", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_x_log10(labels=scientific,breaks=10^c(-5,-3,-1,1,3,5))+
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = exp(0.07)), color = "tomato2", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.75) +
  # annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 15, label = expression(e^0.07~'DNA concentration'),
  annotate("text", x = 0.7, y = 15, label = '1 DNA copies/L',
           color = "tomato2", vjust = -0.3, hjust = 0.5, size = 3, angle = 90) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.005, y = 32, label = "Absence", color = "tomato2", vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  annotate("text", x = 30, y = 32, label = "Presence", color = "tomato2", vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  ylim(0,34)+
  facet_wrap(~species) + # Facet by species
  # labs(x = expression('Log'[e]~'DNA concentration (copies/L)'),
  labs(x = 'DNA concentration (copies/L)',
       y = "Number of samples (frequency)") +
  theme_bw()
sf3

ggsave(file = here('plots','8_Supplementary_Figure_3.jpg'),
       sf3,
       h=8,w=10,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=8, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Supplementary Figure 4 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1794 unique samples
samp_map_qpcr <- qPCR_unk %>% dplyr::select(tubeID,lat,lon,depth_cat) %>% 
  distinct(tubeID,lat,lon,depth_cat) %>% 
  mutate(group='ALL')

# 555 unique samples
samp_map_MB <- qPCR_unk %>% dplyr::select(tubeID,lat,lon,depth_cat) %>% 
  distinct(tubeID,lat,lon,depth_cat) %>% 
  filter(tubeID%in%mfu_raw$tubeID) %>% 
  mutate(group='MB')

# 357 unique samples
samp_map_MB_stan <- qPCR_unk %>% dplyr::select(tubeID,lat,lon,depth_cat) %>% 
  distinct(tubeID,lat,lon,depth_cat) %>% 
  filter(tubeID%in%mfu_stan$tubeID) %>% 
  mutate(group='MB_stan')

samp_map_raw <- samp_map_qpcr %>% mutate(x=paste0(lat,lon,depth_cat)) %>% 
  anti_join(.,
            samp_map_MB %>% mutate(x=paste0(lat,lon,depth_cat)), by = "x") %>% 
  rbind(.,samp_map_MB %>% mutate(x=paste0(lat,lon,depth_cat))) %>% 
  anti_join(.,
            samp_map_MB_stan %>% mutate(x=paste0(lat,lon,depth_cat)), by = "x") %>% 
  select(-x) %>% 
  rbind(.,samp_map_MB_stan)

samp_map <- samp_map_raw %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326, remove = F)

sf4 <-
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = coast_line, fill = 'gray80') +
  geom_sf(data = samp_map %>% filter(depth_cat %in% c(0, 50, 150, 300, 500)),
          aes(color = group, shape = group, size = group)) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat, nrow = 1) +
  ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("ALL" = "deepskyblue1", "MB" = "steelblue4", "MB_stan" = "orangered2"),
    labels = c("qPCR", "Metabarcoding", "Joint samples")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("ALL" = 4, "MB" = 4, "MB_stan" = 18)
  ) +
  scale_size_manual(
    values = c("ALL" = 2, "MB" = 2, "MB_stan" = 2)
  ) +
  labs(color = "Sampling coverage") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax), 
    breaks = c(-125.5, -124)
  ) +
  guides(
    shape = "none", size = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

sf4
ggsave(file = here('plots','9_Supplementary_Figure_4.jpg'),
       sf4,
       h=8,w=10,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r}
# Supplementary Figure 5 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
all_maps <- readRDS(here('Intermediate_data','all_maps_se.rds')) %>% bind_rows(.id='sp') 
  

sp_common <- all_maps$sp %>% unique()
# sp_scie <- fit$species %>% unique()
# sp_list

plot_list <- list()

for (i in 1:12) {
p1 <-
  fit %>% 
  filter(species==sp_list[i]) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326, remove = T) %>%
  st_transform(crs = utm_km_crs) %>%
  mutate(utm.lon.km = st_coordinates(.)[, 1], utm.lat.km = st_coordinates(.)[, 2]) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("utm.lon.km", "utm.lat.km"),crs = utm_km_crs,remove = FALSE) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data=coast_line,fill='gray80')+
  geom_sf(aes(color=exp(Log_D_est)),size=2)+
    # ggtitle(bquote(italic(.(sp_list[i]))))+ 
    # ggtitle(sp_list[i])+
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c(rep('#00496F', 6),pnw_palette(name = "Bay", n = 14, type = "continuous"),rep('#DD4124', 7)),
                       name = "Estimated eDNA\nconcentration\n(copies/L)",
                       trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
                       limits = c(0.001, 10000000),
                       breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000,1000000,10000000),
                       labels = c('0.1', "1", "10", "100", "1000", "10000", '100000','1000000','10000000'))+
  coord_sf(datum=NA)+
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat,nrow=1)+
  ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax),
  breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
  # theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "italic",size = 14))+
  labs(color="Log Copies",x="")  

# p1_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p1)

p2 <- fit %>% 
  filter(species==sp_list[i]) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326, remove = T) %>%
  st_transform(crs = utm_km_crs) %>%
  mutate(utm.lon.km = st_coordinates(.)[, 1], utm.lat.km = st_coordinates(.)[, 2]) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("utm.lon.km", "utm.lat.km"),crs = utm_km_crs,remove = FALSE) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data=coast_line,fill='gray80')+
  geom_sf(aes(color=sd),size=2)+
  # scale_color_gradientn(colors = moma.colors("Alkalay1", n = 12, type = "continuous"),
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = pnw_palette("Moth", n = 12, type = "continuous"),
                        name = "SD of log estimated\neDNA concentration\n(copies/L)",
                        # trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
                        limits = c(0, 3.5),
                        breaks = c(0,1,2,3),
                        labels = c('0','1','2','3'))+
  coord_sf(datum=NA)+
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat,nrow=1)+
  ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax),
  breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
  labs(color="SD of Log Copies",x="")  

# p2_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p2)


p3 <- ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data=coast_line,fill='gray80')+
  geom_sf(data=all_maps %>% filter(sp==sp_common[i]),aes(fill=exp(est)),color=NA)+
  # geom_sf(data=dat_sf,color='red',size=0.5,shape=4)+
  # scale_fill_viridis(option="H")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c(rep('#00496F', 6),pnw_palette(name = "Bay", n = 14, type = "continuous"),rep('#DD4124', 7)),
                       name = "Smoothed estimated\neDNA concentration\n(copies/L)",
                       trans = log_trans(base = exp(1)),
                       limits = c(0.001, 10000000),
                       breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000,1000000,10000000),
                       labels = c('0.1', "1", "10", "100", "1000", "10000", '100000','1000000','10000000'))+
  coord_sf(datum=NA)+
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat,nrow=1)+
  ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax),
                     breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
  labs(fill="Log Copies",x="")

# p3_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p3)


p4 <- ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data=coast_line,fill='gray80')+
  geom_sf(data=all_maps %>% filter(sp==sp_common[i]),aes(fill=est_se),color=NA)+
  # geom_sf(data=dat_sf,color='red',size=0.5,shape=4)+
  # scale_fill_viridis(option="H")+
  # scale_fill_gradientn(colors = moma.colors("Alkalay1", n = 12, type = "continuous"),
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c(pnw_palette("Moth", n = 12, type = "continuous"),rep('#F0F0E4',10)),
                       name = "SE of log prediction of\nsmoothed estimated\neDNA concentration\n(copies/L)",
                       limits = c(0,12.2))+
  coord_sf(datum=NA)+
  facet_wrap(~depth_cat,nrow=1)+
  ylim(dat_bbox$ymin, dat_bbox$ymax) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(dat_bbox$xmin, dat_bbox$xmax),
                     breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
  labs(fill="Standard error \nof Log Copies",x="")

p00 <- ggplot()+
  theme_minimal()
p0 <- ggplot()+
  ggtitle(bquote(italic(.(sp_list[i]))))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "italic",size = 14),
            plot.margin = margin(t = 0, b = -10))+
  theme_minimal()

plot_list[[i]] <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(
  p00,
  p0,
  p1+theme(legend.position = 'none'),
  p2+theme(legend.position = 'none'),
  p3+theme(legend.position = 'none'),
  p4+theme(legend.position = 'none'),
  rel_heights = c(0.3,1,10,10,10,10),
  ncol = 1,align = 'v')
}

plot_list[[i]]

p1_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p1)
p2_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p2)
p3_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p3)
p4_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p4)

legend <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1_legend,
                             p2_legend,
                             p3_legend,
                             p4_legend,
                             ncol = 1,
                             align = 'v')

sf_5_1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_list[[1]],
                   plot_list[[2]],
                   plot_list[[3]],
                   legend,
                   nrow = 1,
                   align = 'h',
                   rel_widths = c(4,4,4,2.2))
sf_5_2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_list[[4]],
                   plot_list[[5]],
                   plot_list[[6]],
                   legend,
                   nrow = 1,
                   align = 'h',
                   rel_widths = c(4,4,4,2.2))
sf_5_3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_list[[7]],
                   plot_list[[8]],
                   plot_list[[9]],
                   legend,
                   nrow = 1,
                   align = 'h',
                   rel_widths = c(4,4,4,2.2))
sf_5_4 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_list[[10]],
                   plot_list[[11]],
                   plot_list[[12]],
                   legend,
                   nrow = 1,
                   align = 'h',
                   rel_widths = c(4,4,4,2.2))


ggsave(here('plots','10_Supplementary_Figure_5_A.jpg'),sf_5_1,width = 10,height = 12)
ggsave(here('plots','10_Supplementary_Figure_5_B.jpg'),sf_5_2,width = 10,height = 12)
ggsave(here('plots','10_Supplementary_Figure_5_C.jpg'),sf_5_3,width = 10,height = 12)
ggsave(here('plots','10_Supplementary_Figure_5_D.jpg'),sf_5_4,width = 10,height = 12)
 

```

```{r}
# Supplementary Figure 6 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Diagnostic plots
stan_post_df <- extract_param(stan_post)
extract_param <- function (model, par) 
{
  fit <- (methods::selectMethod("summary", signature = "stanfit"))(object = model, 
                                                                   par = par)
  fit <- fit$summary
  return(fit %>% unlist() %>% as.data.frame %>% round(., 6))
}
# Determine the range of ESS
ess_range <- stan_post_df$n_eff %>% 
  range(na.rm = TRUE) %>% log() %>% 
  floor() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  setNames('ESS_range') %>% 
  mutate(ESS_range = if_else(row_number(.) == 2, ESS_range + 1, ESS_range)) %>% 
  mutate(ESS_range=exp(ESS_range)) %>% 
  pull(ESS_range)


ess_breaks <-
seq(from = sqrt(ess_range[1]), to = sqrt(ess_range[2]), length.out = 4) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  setNames('ESS_breaks') %>% 
  mutate(ESS_breaks=ESS_breaks^2) %>% 
  mutate(ESS_breaks=round_by10(ESS_breaks)) %>% 
  pull(ESS_breaks)


# Diagnostics & Goodness-of-Fit
p1 <-
stan_post_df %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_histogram(aes(x=n_eff),binwidth = 2,fill = "skyblue", color = "black")+
  # scale_x_continuous(trans = "sqrt", labels = c(500, 2500, 5000, 15000), breaks = c(500, 2500, 5000, 15000)) +
  scale_x_sqrt(labels=scientific_10,limits=ess_range,breaks=ess_breaks) +
  theme_bw()+
  xlab('ESS (Effective Sampling Size)')+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 200, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")+
  annotate("text", x = 200, y = 0, label = "Threshold", color = "red", angle = 90, vjust = 1.3,hjust = -1, size=5) +
  ylab('Number of\nparameters')+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size=13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=14)
  )


# Determine the range of Rhat
rhat_range <-
stan_post_df$Rhat %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  setNames('Rhat') %>% 
  mutate(nparam = nrow(.),
         max = max(Rhat, na.rm = TRUE),
         min = min(Rhat, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  summarise(nparam=first(nparam),
            max = first(max),
            min = first(min)) %>% 
  mutate(binwidth=((max-min)/nparam)*10) %>% 
  mutate(max=if_else(max<1.05,1.06,max))
  

rhat_breaks <-
seq(from = rhat_range$min, to = rhat_range$max, length.out = 4) %>%
  tibble(values = .) %>%
  mutate(values = ifelse(abs(values - 1) == min(abs(values - 1)), 1, values)) %>% 
  mutate(values = round(values, 2)) %>% 
  pull(values)

p2 <-
stan_post_df %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_histogram(aes(x=Rhat),binwidth = rhat_range$binwidth,fill = "skyblue", color = "black")+
  theme_bw()+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(rhat_range$min,rhat_range$max),labels = rhat_breaks)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.05, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")+
  annotate("text", x = 1.05, y = 600, label = "Threshold", color = "red", angle = 90, vjust = 1.5,hjust=2, size=5) +
  xlab('Rhat')+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size=13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=13),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  )

pp1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1,p2,nrow = 1)

# pp1

# Tree depth ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sampler_params <- get_sampler_params(stan_post, inc_warmup = T)

warmup_it <- stan_post@stan_args[[1]]$warmup
samp_it <- stan_post@stan_args[[1]]$iter

# Extract tree depth for each chain
tre <- lapply(sampler_params, function(x) x[, "treedepth__"])
acc <- lapply(sampler_params, function(x) x[, "accept_stat__"])
sts <- lapply(sampler_params, function(x) x[, "stepsize__"])
div <- lapply(sampler_params, function(x) x[, "divergent__"])
log_lik <- get_logposterior(stan_post, inc_warmup = TRUE)

tree_depths_df <- 
  tibble(Iteration = rep(1:length(tre[[1]]),length(tre)),
    Chain = rep(1:length(tre),each = length(tre[[1]])),
         Tree_Depth = unlist(tre))
acc_df <- 
  tibble(Iteration = rep(1:length(acc[[1]]),length(acc)),
         Chain = rep(1:length(acc),each = length(acc[[1]])),
         Tree_Depth = unlist(acc))
sts_df <- 
  tibble(Iteration = rep(1:length(sts[[1]]),length(sts)),
         Chain = rep(1:length(sts),each = length(sts[[1]])),
         Tree_Depth = unlist(sts))
div_df <- 
  tibble(Iteration = rep(1:length(div[[1]]),length(div)),
         Chain = rep(1:length(div),each = length(div[[1]])),
         Tree_Depth = unlist(div))

lik_df <- 
  tibble(Iteration = rep(1:length(log_lik[[1]]),length(log_lik)),
         Chain = rep(1:length(log_lik),each = length(log_lik[[1]])),
         Tree_Depth = unlist(log_lik))

chain_col_map <- setNames(
  c('#F0944C',
    '#A3A55F',
    '#b4e5dd',
    '#C47688',
    '#B2B9BC',
    '#2E92A2'),c(1:6))

  
p1 <-
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=tree_depths_df %>% filter(Iteration>=warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data=tree_depths_df %>% filter(Iteration<warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5,alpha=0.6) +
  labs(x = "Iteration",y = "Tree depth",color = "Chain") +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 1000, linetype = "dashed",size=1, color = "black")+
  theme_bw()+
  scale_color_manual(values = chain_col_map)+
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = warmup_it, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.2)+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"),
    legend.position = 'none')

p2 <-
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data=div_df %>% filter(Iteration>=warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain))) +
  geom_point(data=div_df %>% filter(Iteration<warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),alpha=0.6) +
  labs(x = "Iteration",y = "Divergence\ntransition",color = "Chain") +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 1000, linetype = "dashed",size=1, color = "black")+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.25,1.25), breaks=c(0,1),labels = c('No','Yes'))+
  theme_bw()+
  scale_color_manual(values = chain_col_map)+
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = warmup_it, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.2)+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"),
    legend.position = 'none')


p3 <-
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=sts_df %>% filter(Iteration>=warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data=sts_df %>% filter(Iteration<warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5,alpha=0.6) +
  labs(x = "Iteration",y = "Step size",color = "Chain") +
  theme_bw()+
  ylim(quantile(sts_df$Tree_Depth,0.0005),quantile(sts_df$Tree_Depth,0.9995))+
  scale_color_manual(values = chain_col_map)+
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = warmup_it, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.2)+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size=14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"),
    legend.position = 'none')

p4 <-
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=acc_df %>% filter(Iteration>=warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data=acc_df %>% filter(Iteration<warmup_it),aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5,alpha=0.6) +
  labs(x = "Iteration",y = "Accepctance rate",color = "Chain") +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 1000, linetype = "dashed",size=1, color = "black")+
  theme_bw()+
  # ylim(0,0.075)+
  scale_color_manual(values = chain_col_map)+
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = warmup_it, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.2)+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"),
    legend.position = 'none')


p5 <-
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=lik_df %>% filter(Iteration>=warmup_it),
            aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data=lik_df %>% filter(Iteration<warmup_it),
            aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 0.5,alpha=0.6) +
  labs(x = "Iteration",y = "Posterior likelihood",color = "Chain") +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 1000, linetype = "dashed",size=1, color = "black")+
  theme_bw()+
  # ylim(quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.15),quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.975))
  # scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) scientific_10(x, precision = 3))
scale_y_continuous(labels=scientific_type_2,limits=c(quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.05),quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.975)),
                     breaks = c(quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.05),
                                quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.15),
                                quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.5),
                                quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.85),
                                quantile(lik_df$Tree_Depth,0.975)))+
  scale_color_manual(values = chain_col_map)+
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = warmup_it, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.2)+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=11),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.position = 'none')

legend <-
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=lik_df,aes(x = Iteration, y = Tree_Depth, color = as.factor(Chain)),linewidth = 1) +
  theme_bw()+
  labs(x = "Iteration",y = "Accepctance rate",color = "Chain") +
  scale_color_manual(values = chain_col_map)+
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = 200, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "Warmup"),color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 200, xmax = 1000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "Sampling"), color = "black",alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Phase", values = c("Warmup" = "grey70", "Sampling" = "white")) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"))

leg <- cowplot::get_legend(legend)

pp2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p5,p4,p1,p2,p3,ncol = 1,align = 'v',rel_heights = c(5,5,5,2.2,6))

pp3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp1,pp2,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(1,3),labels = c('A','B'),label_x = 1)
sf6 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp3,leg,ncol = 2,rel_widths = c(7,1.5))

sf6

ggsave(here('plots','11_Supplementary_Figure_6.jpg'),
       sf6,
       height = 13,width = 9)
```

```{r}
# Supplementary Figure 7 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Prior Sensitivity 
log_D <- extract_param(stan_post,'log_D') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  mutate(sp=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,2]) %>% 
  mutate(sp=str_split_fixed(sp,',', 3)[,2]) %>% 
  mutate(sp=str_split_fixed(sp,'\\]', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  mutate(sp=as.numeric(sp)) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='5.log_D') %>% 
  left_join(stan_data$sp_list,
            by=c('sp'='species_idx')) %>% 
  filter(sp!=13) 


  
beta_0 <- extract_param(stan_post,'beta_std_curve_0') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='1.beta_std_curve_0') %>% 
  mutate(mean=39+mean,`2.5%`=`2.5%`+39,`97.5%`=`97.5%`+39)

beta_1 <- extract_param(stan_post,'beta_std_curve_1') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='2.beta_std_curve_1')
log_D_station_depth <- extract_param(stan_post,'log_D_station_depth') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='4.log_D_station_depth')
bio_rep_param <- extract_param(stan_post,'bio_rep_param') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='2.bio_rep_param')

mean_hake <- extract_param(stan_post,'mean_hake') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='6.mean_hake')
tau <- extract_param(stan_post,'tau_bio_rep') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='1.tau_bio_rep')
logit_phi_0 <- extract_param(stan_post,'logit_phi_0') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='3.logit_phi_0')
gamma_0 <- extract_param(stan_post,'gamma_0') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='1.gamma_0')
gamma_1 <- extract_param(stan_post,'gamma_1') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='2.gamma_1')
log_D_sigma <- extract_param(stan_post,'log_D_sigma') %>% 
  rownames_to_column('x') %>% 
  mutate(param=str_split_fixed(x,'\\[', 3)[,1]) %>% 
  select(-x) %>% mutate(param='3.log_D_sigma')



log_D_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,5)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='5.log_D')
mean_hake_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,2,2)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='6.mean_hake')
tau_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,0.2)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=0) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='1.tau_bio_rep')
logit_phi_0_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,3,1)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='3.logit_phi_0')
gamma_0_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,1)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='1.gamma_0')
gamma_1_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,1)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='2.gamma_1')
beta_0_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,39,3)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='1.beta_std_curve_0')
beta_1_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,-1.4,0.05)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='2.beta_std_curve_1')
log_D_sigma_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,3)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=0) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='3.log_D_sigma')
log_D_station_depth_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,1.6)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='4.log_D_station_depth')
bio_rep_param_prior <- data.frame(mean=rnorm(1e4,0,0.95)) %>% 
  mutate(lower=quantile(mean,probs = 0.025)) %>% 
  mutate(upper=quantile(mean,probs = 0.975)) %>% 
  summarise(mean=mean(mean),lower=mean(lower),upper=mean(upper)) %>% 
  mutate(param='2.bio_rep_param')

first_col <- c("6.mean_hake",
               "3.logit_phi_0",
               "1.gamma_0",
               "2.gamma_1")

second_col <- c("1.tau_bio_rep",  
                '4.log_D_station_depth', 
                "3.log_D_sigma", 
                '2.bio_rep_param') 

third_col <- c('1.beta_std_curve_0',
               '2.beta_std_curve_1')
# log_D

post_jitter <- bind_rows(beta_0,beta_1,log_D_station_depth,bio_rep_param)
post_single <- bind_rows(mean_hake,tau,logit_phi_0,gamma_0,gamma_1,log_D_sigma)
priors <- bind_rows(log_D_prior,mean_hake_prior,tau_prior,logit_phi_0_prior,
                    gamma_0_prior,gamma_1_prior,beta_0_prior,beta_1_prior,
                    log_D_sigma_prior,log_D_station_depth_prior,
                    bio_rep_param_prior)


jitter <- position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.3, seed = 123)

pp1 <-
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data=post_single %>% filter(param%in%first_col),aes(x=mean,y=param))+
  geom_errorbar(data=post_single %>% filter(param%in%first_col),aes(y = param,xmin = `2.5%`, xmax = `97.5%`), width = 0.05,alpha=1) +
  
  geom_point(data=priors%>% filter(param%in%first_col),aes(x=mean,y=param),color='tomato2',size=3,
             position = position_nudge(y = -0.1))+
  geom_errorbar(data=priors%>% filter(param%in%first_col),aes(y = param,xmin = lower, xmax = upper),color='red', width = 0.05,
                position = position_nudge(y = -0.1)) +
  
  # facet_wrap(~param,scales = "free_y",ncol = 1)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(strip.text = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=17),
        axis.title.x =element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank())+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("6.mean_hake" = expression(psi),
                              "1.gamma_0" = expression(gamma[0]),
                              "2.gamma_1" = expression(gamma[1]),
                              "3.logit_phi_0" = expression(phi)))


pp2 <-
bind_rows(post_jitter,post_single) %>% 
  filter(param%in%second_col) %>% 
  filter(param%in%post_jitter$param) %>% 
# post_jitter %>%
ggplot(aes(x = mean, y = param)) +
  
  geom_point(data=post_single %>% filter(param%in%second_col),aes(x=mean,y=param))+
  geom_errorbar(data=post_single %>% filter(param%in%second_col),aes(y = param,xmin = `2.5%`, xmax = `97.5%`), width = 0.05,alpha=1) +
  
  geom_jitter(aes(x = mean, y = param),position = jitter,alpha=0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(y = param,xmin = `2.5%`, xmax = `97.5%`), position = jitter, width = 0.01,alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_point(data=priors%>% filter(param%in%second_col),aes(x=mean,y=param),color='tomato2',size=3,
             position = position_nudge(y = -0.1))+
  geom_errorbar(data=priors%>% filter(param%in%second_col),aes(y = param,xmin = lower, xmax = upper),color='red', width = 0.05,
                position = position_nudge(y = -0.1)) +
  
  # facet_wrap(~param,scales = "free_y",ncol = 1)+
  theme_bw()+
    theme(strip.text = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=17),
          axis.title.x =element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank())+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c(
                              "1.tau_bio_rep" = expression(tau),
                              "3.log_D_sigma" = expression(sigma[D]),
                              "4.log_D_station_depth" = expression(epsilon[j]),
                              "2.bio_rep_param" = expression(delta)))

pp3 <-
bind_rows(post_jitter,post_single) %>% 
  filter(param%in%third_col) %>% 
  filter(param%in%post_jitter$param) %>% 
# post_jitter %>%
ggplot(aes(x = mean, y = param)) +
  
  geom_jitter(aes(x = mean, y = param),position = jitter,alpha=0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(y = param,xmin = `2.5%`, xmax = `97.5%`), position = jitter, width = 0.01,alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_point(data=priors%>% filter(param%in%third_col),aes(x=mean,y=param),color='tomato2',size=3,
             position = position_nudge(y = -0.1))+
  geom_errorbar(data=priors%>% filter(param%in%third_col),aes(y = param,xmin = lower, xmax = upper),color='red', width = 0.05,
                position = position_nudge(y = -0.1)) +
  
  facet_wrap(~param,scales = "free",ncol = 2)+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1.6,-1.5,-1.4,-1.3,35,40,45))+
  theme_bw()+
    theme(strip.text = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=17),
          axis.title.x =element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank())+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("1.beta_std_curve_0" = expression(beta[0]),
                              "2.beta_std_curve_1" = expression(beta[1])))

xlegend <-
data_frame(mean=c(1,1),param=c(1,1),lik=c('Prior','Posterior')) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = mean, y = param,colour = lik),size=3) +
  geom_line(aes(x = mean, y = param,colour = lik),size=1.5)+
  theme_bw()+
  labs(colour = "Likelihood")+
  scale_color_manual(values=c('Prior'='tomato2','Posterior'='black'))+
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"))

pp4 <-
log_D %>%
ggplot(aes(x = mean, y = param)) +
  
  geom_jitter(aes(x = mean, y = species),position = jitter,alpha=0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(y = species,xmin = `2.5%`, xmax = `97.5%`), position = jitter, width = 0.01,alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_point(data=priors%>% filter(param=='5.log_D'),aes(x=mean,y='Clupea pallasii'),color='tomato2',size=3,
             position = position_nudge(y = -0.41))+
  geom_errorbar(data=priors%>% filter(param=='5.log_D'),aes(y = 'Clupea pallasii',xmin = lower, xmax = upper),color='red', width = 0.15,
                position = position_nudge(y = -0.41)) +
  
  facet_wrap(~param,scales = "free",ncol = 2)+
  theme_bw()+
    theme(strip.text = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=11,face = "italic"),
          axis.title.x =element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank())

legend <-
data_frame(mean=c(1,1),param=c(1,1),lik=c('Prior','Posterior')) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = mean, y = param,colour = lik),size=3) +
  geom_line(aes(x = mean, y = param,colour = lik),size=1.5)+
  theme_bw()+
  labs(colour = "Likelihood")+
  scale_color_manual(values=c('Prior'='tomato2','Posterior'='black'))+
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.7, "lines"))

leg <- cowplot::get_legend(legend)

p1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp1,pp2)
p2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp3,p1,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(1,4))
p3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pp4,p2)

sf7 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p3,leg,rel_widths = c(7,1))
sf7

ggsave(here('plots','12_Supplementary_Figure_7.jpg'),
       sf7,
       height = 12,width = 15)

```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=12, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Supplementary Figure 8 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Continuous model 
 
color_mapping <-
  stan_data$sp_list %>% select(-species_idx) %>% 
  mutate(species=if_else(species=='Zz_Merluccius productus','Merluccius productus',species)) %>% 
  mutate(col = case_when(
    species == 'Engraulis mordax' ~ '#F0944C',
    species == 'Scomber japonicus' ~ '#B2B9BC',
    species == 'Sardinops sagax' ~ '#AB4E68',
    species == 'Trachurus symmetricus' ~ '#CDA59B',
    species == 'Thaleichthys pacificus' ~ '#A3A55F',
    species == 'Clupea pallasii' ~ '#41959A',
    species == 'Sebastes entomelas' ~ '#97D8CA',
    species == 'Tarletonbeania crenularis' ~ '#C47688',
    species == 'Stenobrachius leucopsarus' ~ '#679C74',
    species == 'Tactostoma macropus' ~ '#b4e5dd',
    species == 'Leuroglossus stilbius' ~ '#EEB357',
    species == 'Merluccius productus' ~ '#2E92A2',
    species == 'Microstomus pacificus' ~ '#D85A44')) %>% 
  deframe()

beta_0_param <- extract_param(stan_post,'beta_std_curve_0') %>% 
  mutate(plate_idx=1:nrow(.))
beta_1_param <- extract_param(stan_post,'beta_std_curve_1') %>% 
  mutate(plate_idx=1:nrow(.))
eq_param <- extract_param(stan_post,'unk_conc_qpcr')

post_pred_qpcr_cm <- stan_data$qpcr_unk %>% 
  left_join(.,beta_0_param %>% select(mean,plate_idx) %>% 
              rename(beta_0='mean'),
            by='plate_idx') %>% 
  left_join(.,beta_1_param %>% select(mean,plate_idx) %>% 
              rename(beta_1='mean'),
            by='plate_idx') %>%
  mutate(beta_0_offset=stan_data$beta_std_curve_0_offset) %>% 
  cbind(.,eq_param %>% select(mean)) %>% 
  rename(eq='mean')

sf8_a <- post_pred_qpcr_cm %>% 
  filter(Ct!=99) %>% 
  mutate(Ct_pred=(beta_0_offset + beta_0) + (beta_1*eq)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=Ct,y=Ct_pred),color=color_mapping[13],alpha=0.2)+
  ylab('Predicted Ct')+
  xlab('Observed Ct')+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))

## Detection probability model -----------------------------------------------------------------

phi_0_param <- extract_param(stan_post,'phi_0')
eq_param <- extract_param(stan_post,'unk_conc_qpcr')

post_pred_qpcr_pd <- stan_data$qpcr_unk %>% 
  mutate(phi_0=phi_0_param$mean) %>% 
  mutate(phi_0_lo=phi_0_param$`2.5%`) %>% 
  mutate(phi_0_up=phi_0_param$`97.5%`) %>% 
  cbind(.,eq_param %>% select(mean,`2.5%`,`97.5%`) %>% rename(eq='mean',eq_lo=`2.5%`,eq_up=`97.5%`)) %>% 
  group_by(tubeID) %>%
  mutate(obs_theta = mean(z)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(p_tmp=- 2 * exp(eq) * phi_0) %>% 
  mutate(theta_pred=inverselogit(log(1-exp(p_tmp))-p_tmp)) %>% 
  mutate(p_tmp_lo=- 2 * exp(eq) * phi_0_lo) %>% 
  mutate(theta_pred_lo=inverselogit(log(1-exp(p_tmp_lo))-p_tmp_lo)) %>% 
  mutate(p_tmp_up=- 2 * exp(eq) * phi_0_up) %>% 
  mutate(theta_pred_up=inverselogit(log(1-exp(p_tmp_up))-p_tmp_up))

post_pred_qpcr_pd_smooth <- 
  post_pred_qpcr_pd %>% 
  group_by(obs_theta) %>% 
  summarise(theta_pred_mean=median(theta_pred),
            theta_pred_mean_lo=median(theta_pred_lo),
            theta_pred_mean_up=median(theta_pred_up))


# The new model
sf8_b <-
  post_pred_qpcr_pd %>% 
  ggplot()+
  theme_bw()+
  geom_point(aes(x=obs_theta,y=theta_pred),color=color_mapping[13],alpha=0.2,size=2)+
  geom_smooth(data=post_pred_qpcr_pd_smooth,
              aes(x=obs_theta,y=theta_pred_mean),color=color_mapping[13],se=F,lty=1, size=1.5,span = 0.75)+
  geom_smooth(data=post_pred_qpcr_pd_smooth,
              aes(x=obs_theta,y=theta_pred_mean_lo),color=color_mapping[13],se=F,lty=2,size=0.75)+
  geom_smooth(data=post_pred_qpcr_pd_smooth,
              aes(x=obs_theta,y=theta_pred_mean_up),color=color_mapping[13],se=F,lty=2,size=0.75)+
  ylab('Predicted probability of detection')+
  xlab('Observed probability of detection')+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))
# sf8_b

## Metabarcoding model -------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Extract the estimated log concentration
post_conc <- extract_matrix(stan_post,'log_D')

alpha <- extract_param(stan_post_mock,'alpha') %>% pull(mean)

# Estimate gamma
pred_logit_val_samp <- t(t(post_conc - post_conc$`13`) +
                           (unique(stan_data$model_vector_a_samp)*alpha))

# Estimate species proportions/probabilities
pred_prop_samp <- pred_logit_val_samp %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  t() %>% softmax_m() %>% t() %>% as.data.frame()

# Generate the predicted number of reads (multinomial random generator function)
pred_reads <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA,nrow = nrow(pred_prop_samp),
                                   ncol = ncol(pred_prop_samp)))
for (i in 1:nrow(pred_prop_samp)) {
  pred_reads[i,] <-
    rmultinom(1, 
              rowSums(stan_data$sample_data)[i], 
              pred_prop_samp[i,]) %>% t() %>% 
    as.data.frame()
}

# Convert data into long format (lf)
pred_reads_lf <- pred_reads %>% `colnames<-`(colnames(stan_data$sample_data)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),         
    names_to = "species_idx_raw",
    values_to = "pred_reads") %>% 
  left_join(.,stan_data$sp_list %>% mutate(species_idx_raw=paste0('sp_',species_idx)),
            by='species_idx_raw') %>% 
  select(-species_idx_raw,-species_idx) %>% 
  mutate(species = if_else(species == 'Zz_Merluccius productus', 'Merluccius productus',species))

obs_reads_lf <- 
  stan_data$sample_data %>% pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = 'species_idx_raw',
    values_to = 'obs_reads') %>% 
  left_join(.,stan_data$sp_list %>% mutate(species_idx_raw=paste0('sp_',species_idx)),
            by='species_idx_raw') %>% 
  select(-species_idx_raw,-species_idx) %>% 
  mutate(species = if_else(species == 'Zz_Merluccius productus', 'Merluccius productus',species))

# Combine lf data for plotting
comb_reads <- cbind(pred_reads_lf,obs_reads_lf %>% rename(species_2='species'))

legend <- comb_reads %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=obs_reads,y=pred_reads,color=species))+
  labs(color = "Species") +
  theme_bw()+
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping)+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11,face = "italic"))

leg1 <- cowplot::get_legend(legend+theme(legend.justification = c(0.5, 0.8)))


sf8_c <-
  comb_reads %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=obs_reads,y=pred_reads,color=species))+
  scale_x_log10(labels=scientific,breaks=10^c(0:6))+
  scale_y_log10(labels=scientific,breaks=10^c(0:6))+
```
