```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=12, out.width="100%",warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
  labs(color = "Species") +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping)+
  ylab('Predicted sequence reads')+
  xlab('Observed sequence reads')+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = 'none',
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))

## Mock model -------------------------------------------------------------------------
mockIDs <- stan_data$mock_data_labeled$mockID

# mock communities - reads
mock_reads_dat <- stan_data %>%
  pluck('mock_data') %>% 
  mutate(mockID=mockIDs) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-mockID,names_to = 'taxa',values_to='reads')

# mock communities - proportions
mock_alr_dat <- stan_data %>%
  pluck('alr_mock_true_prop') %>% 
  mutate(mockID=mockIDs) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-mockID,names_to = 'taxa',values_to='alr') %>% 
  group_by(mockID) %>% 
  mutate(prop=softmax(alr)) %>% 
  ungroup()

# mock communities - fitted (estimated) values
mock_fit <- extract_param(stan_post_mock,'logit_val_mock') %>% 
  mutate(mockID=mock_alr_dat$mockID) %>% 
  mutate(se_mean=ifelse(is.nan(se_mean),0,se_mean)) %>% 
  mutate(alr_upper=mean+se_mean,alr_lower=mean-se_mean) %>% 
  group_by(mockID) %>% 
  mutate(prop=softmax(mean),prop_lower=softmax(`2.5%`),prop_upper=softmax(`97.5%`)) %>% 
  ungroup()

# join obs/preds
mock_alr_join <- mock_alr_dat %>%
  mutate(alr_fit=mock_fit$mean,
         alr_upper=mock_fit$alr_upper,
         alr_lower=mock_fit$alr_lower,
         prop_fit=mock_fit$prop,
         prop_upper=mock_fit$prop_upper,
         prop_lower=mock_fit$prop_lower) %>% 
  mutate(taxa=gsub('alr_','',taxa)) %>% 
  mutate(species_idx=as.integer(taxa)) %>% 
  left_join(.,stan_data$sp_list %>% 
              mutate(species=if_else(species=='Zz_Merluccius productus','Merluccius productus',species)),
            by='species_idx')

mock_reads_join <- mock_reads_dat %>% 
  mutate(prop_fit=mock_fit$prop,
         prop_upper=mock_fit$prop_upper,
         prop_lower=mock_fit$prop_lower) %>% 
  # back out estimated reads from proportions
  group_by(mockID) %>% 
  mutate(sumreads=sum(reads)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(reads_fit=prop_fit*sumreads,
         reads_upper=prop_upper*sumreads,
         reads_lower=prop_lower*sumreads) %>% 
  mutate(taxa=gsub('sp_','',taxa)) %>% 
  mutate(species_idx=as.integer(taxa)) %>% 
  left_join(.,stan_data$sp_list %>% 
              mutate(species=if_else(species=='Zz_Merluccius productus','Merluccius productus',species)),
            by='species_idx')

sf8_d <- mock_alr_join %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=prop_fit,x=prop,col=species,ymin=prop_lower,ymax=prop_upper))+
  geom_pointrange()+
  geom_abline(slope=1,intercept=0,linetype=2)+
  ylab('Predicted sequence proportion')+
  xlab('Observed sequence proportion')+
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = 'none',
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))

sf8_e <- mock_reads_join %>% 
  mutate(reads_fit=if_else(reads_fit<0.1,0,reads_fit)) %>%
  mutate(reads_upper=if_else(reads_upper<0.1,0,reads_upper)) %>%
  mutate(reads_lower=if_else(reads_lower<0.1,0,reads_lower)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=reads_fit,x=reads,col=species,ymin=reads_lower,ymax=reads_upper))+
  geom_pointrange()+
  geom_abline(slope=1,intercept=0,linetype=2)+
  ylab('Predicted sequence reads')+
  xlab('Observed sequence reads')+
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping)+
  scale_x_log10(labels=scientific,breaks=10^c(0:6))+
  scale_y_log10(labels=scientific,breaks=10^c(0:6))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = 'none',
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))

sf8 <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(sf8_a,sf8_b,sf8_d,sf8_e,sf8_c,leg1,labels = c('A','B','C','D','E'),ncol = 2,align = 'v')

sf8
ggsave(file = here('plots','13_Supplementary_Figure_8.jpg'),
       sf8,
       h=13,w=11,units='in',bg='white')
```

```{r}
# Supplementary Figure 9 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
Log_d_est_all <- fit %>% mutate(species_n=paste0('sp_',species_idx)) %>%
  left_join(.,
            stan_data[["sample_data_labeled"]] %>% 
              pivot_longer(cols = sp_1:sp_13,
                           values_to = 'reads',
                           names_to = 'species_n') %>% 
              select(-station_depth_idx,-tubeID,-tech,
                     -station_idx),
            by=c('tube_idx','species_n')) %>% 
  mutate(presence=if_else(reads>0,1,0))

# Fit logistic regression
mod <- glm(presence ~ Log_D_est, data = Log_d_est_all, family = binomial)

# 50% detection threshold
thresh_50 <- -coef(mod)["(Intercept)"] / coef(mod)["Log_D_est"]
thresh_50

p1_raw <- Log_d_est_all %>% 
  mutate(presence = factor(presence, levels = c(0, 1), 
                           labels = c("Absent", "Present"))) %>%
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=Log_D_est,y=sd,color = presence),size=1,alpha=0.6)+
  labs(
    y = "SD of Credible Intervals of\nspecies-specific estimated\neDNA concentration\n(log copies / L)",
    x = "Species-specific estimated eDNA concentration\n(log copies / L)") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Absent" = "#d62728", "Present" = "#1f77b4"),
    name = "Metabarcoding\ndetection\n(Reads > 0)") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1)))

p1 <- p1_raw+theme(legend.position = 'none')
legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p1_raw)



p2 <- Log_d_est_all %>% filter(species_idx != 13) %>% 
  select(Log_D_est, sd, tube_idx, species_idx, presence) %>% 
  left_join(.,
            Log_d_est_all %>% filter(species_idx == 13) %>% 
              select(Log_D_est, sd, tube_idx),
            by = 'tube_idx') %>%
  mutate(presence = factor(presence, levels = c(0, 1), 
                           labels = c("Absent", "Present"))) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = sd.y, y = sd.x, color = presence),size=1, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope=1,lty=2,size=0.5,alpha=0.4)+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Absent" = "#d62728", "Present" = "#1f77b4"),
    name = "Detection"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "SD of Credible Intervals of hake qPCR estimated \neDNA concentration (log copies / L)",
    # y = "SD of Credible Intervals of\nspecies-specific estimated\neDNA concentration\n(log copies / L)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1)))

p3 <-
Log_d_est_all %>% 
  mutate(presence_f = factor(presence, levels = c(0, 1), 
                           labels = c("A", "P"))) %>%
  ggplot()+
  geom_jitter(aes(x=exp(Log_D_est), y=presence,color=presence_f),size=1, height = 0.05, width = 0, alpha=0.6)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = exp(thresh_50),
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("A", "P"))+
  scale_x_log10(labels=scientific)+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("A" = "#d62728", "P" = "#1f77b4")) +
  labs(x = "Species-specific estimated eDNA concentration\n(copies / L)",
       y = "Presence / Absence (P/A)\nfrom metabarcoding reads\n(Reads > 0)")+
  annotate("text", x = 0.9, y = 0.5, label = '1 DNA copies/L',
           color = "tomato2", vjust = -0.3, hjust = 0.5, size = 5, angle = 90) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = 'none',
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14))
  



Log_d_est_all %>% 
  # filter(presence==1) %>% 
  # mutate(threshold=if_else(Log_D_est>0.07469153,1,0)) %>% 
  mutate(threshold=if_else(Log_D_est>0.07,1,0)) %>%
  count(presence,threshold)


p4 <-
Log_d_est_all %>% 
  mutate(presence = factor(presence, levels = c(0, 1), 
                           labels = c("Absent", "Present"))) %>%
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(x=reads,y=exp(Log_D_est),color = presence),size=1,alpha=0.6)+
  scale_x_log10(labels=scientific)+
  scale_y_log10(labels=scientific)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = exp(thresh_50),
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  labs(
    x = "Species-specific metabarcoding reads",
    y = "Species-specific estimated\neDNA concentration\n(copies / L)") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Absent" = "#d62728", "Present" = "#1f77b4"),
    name = "Metabarcoding\ndetection (R>0)") +
  annotate("text", x = 10^3, y = 0.1, label = "1 DNA copies/L", color = "tomato2", vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = 'none',
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1)))



sf9 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1,p2,p3,p4,nrow = 2,align = 'vh',labels = c('A','B','C','D')) %>% 
  cowplot::plot_grid(.,legend,rel_widths = c(9,1))

ggsave(here('Plots','14_Supplementary_Figure_9.jpg'),
       sf9,
       width = 14,height = 8)

```

```{r}
# Supplementary Figure 10 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
sf10_data <-
  stan_data[["qpcr_unk"]] %>% cbind(.,extract_param(stan_post,'unk_conc_qpcr')) %>% 
  mutate(depth_cat=if_else(depth_cat==200,150,depth_cat)) %>% 
  mutate(depth_cat=if_else(depth_cat==25,50,depth_cat)) %>% 
  filter(!depth_cat==100) %>% #remove 100m depth because there is no metabarcoding on that depth
  mutate(H_pres=if_else(Ct>50,0,1)) %>%
  group_by(lat,lon,depth_cat,station_depth_idx,tubeID) %>% 
  summarise(qPCR_tot=1,
            qPCR_pres=max(H_pres)) %>% 
  left_join(.,mfu_raw %>% 
              filter(Species=='Merluccius productus') %>% 
              mutate(h_mb_pres=if_else(nReads>0,1,0)) %>% 
              mutate(tubeID=as.character(tubeID)) %>% 
              group_by(lat,lon,depth_cat,tubeID) %>% 
              summarise(h_mb_pres=max(h_mb_pres),
                        mb_tot=1),
            by=c('lat','lon','depth_cat','tubeID')) %>% 
  mutate(h_mb_pres=if_else(is.na(h_mb_pres),0,h_mb_pres),
         mb_tot=if_else(is.na(mb_tot),0,mb_tot)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(depth_cat) %>% 
  summarise(qPCR_tot=sum(qPCR_tot),
            qPCR_pres=sum(qPCR_pres),
            MB=sum(mb_tot),
            H_MB=sum(h_mb_pres)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = qPCR_tot:H_MB,
               values_to = 'samples',
               names_to = 'cat_samp') 

sf10 <- sf10_data %>%   
  mutate(cat_samp=factor(cat_samp,levels = c('qPCR_tot','qPCR_pres','MB','H_MB'))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(depth_cat),
             y = samples,
             fill = cat_samp)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge")+
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(qPCR_tot = "tomato2",
               qPCR_pres = 'orange',
               MB = "deepskyblue4",
               H_MB = "deepskyblue2"),
    labels = c(qPCR_tot = "Total qPCR sample",
               qPCR_pres = 'Hake qPCR positive',
               MB = "Total MB sample",
               H_MB = "Hake MB positive"),
    name='Sample type')+
  labs(x='Depth (m)', y='Number of samples')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)

sf10

ggsave(here('Plots','15_Supplementary_Figure_10.jpg'),
       sf10,
       width = 12,height = 8)
```

```{r}
# Supplementary Figure 11 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
dens_samp_data <- fit %>% filter(species == 'Clupea pallasii') %>% 
  select(lat,lon,depth_cat)

dat_bbox_wgs84 <- c(xmin = min(dens_samp_data$lon),
                    xmax = max(dens_samp_data$lon),
                    ymin = min(dens_samp_data$lat),
                    ymax = max(dens_samp_data$lat))

depth_polygons <- preds$herring %>%
  filter(species == "Clupea pallasii") %>%
  group_by(depth_cat) %>%
  summarize(.groups = "drop") %>%
  st_transform(4326)

sf11 <- dens_samp_data %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = after_stat(density)),
    geom    = "raster",
    contour = FALSE,
    adjust  = 0.31) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c(
      scales::alpha("white", 0),   # force 0 = transparent
      pnw_palette("Bay",10,type="continuous")),
    name = "Sample\ndensity")+
  facet_wrap(~ depth_cat, ncol = 5) +
  geom_sf(data = depth_polygons,fill = NA,color = "black",linewidth = 0.5,lty=2) +
  geom_sf(data = coast_line, fill = "grey80", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.3,inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim   = c(dat_bbox_wgs84["xmin"], dat_bbox_wgs84["xmax"]),
    ylim   = c(dat_bbox_wgs84["ymin"], dat_bbox_wgs84["ymax"]),
    expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-125.5, -124)) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))

sf11
ggsave(here('plots','16_Supplementary_Figure_11.jpg'),
       sf11,
       width = 9,height = 6)
```
